titleStmt.title: SII 25.183: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 183. (A.R. No. 183 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph commences with the praśasti, Puyal-vāyttu-maṇvaḷara, etc., of the king. It may palaeographically be assigned to c. 13th Century.

It records the grant of lands at Tiruchchennel[puṟ]am to the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tiruuśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Puṟaṅkaṟambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu. The purpose of the grant and the details of the lands endowed are not known as the record after the 8th line is built in.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . puyal vāttu maṇvaḷarappuliyāṇaiyañ cakkaramum ceyal vāyppu paṉnūlum ceṅkolun ticainaṭappak karuṅkaliyum veṇmatiyum kālkalaṅki nilaitaḷarac cūriyavaṅśatilatameṉac coḷakulamuṭikavittu manunūlu maṟaināṉkum vaḻuvāmil vaḷattaruḷi Iṟai muṟaimai Etticaiyum Iyampu meṉakkeṭṭaruḷittiṟai Iṭāt teṉṉavaṉ mel taṇṭevat tiruvuḷḷamāy vaḻuti taṉatākki maturai nakar tiṟaippaṭuttip pūṇṭa perum poril veṉṟava
ṉ muṭittalai koṇṭamar muṭittukkoṇṭa peruṅkavariyuṅ koṭumuṭiyum kulamakaḷum piṭiyuṇṇa putalvar tam viralteṟittu pukaḻmaiṉtaṉaip percāṭṭi Apaiyameṉṟu varutalāl Araciyāṟkaiyoṭum kūṭṭavantu vaṇaṅkutalum ciṉamaṟaintu tiruvuḷḷamāyt teṉṉavaṉāmeṉa moḻintu paṭṭoḷiyum disāsanamum paricaṭṭamu mikanalki Aracum Āṇmaiyum Avaṟkaḷittu Aṇi maturaiyavaṟkākki viṭaikoṭuttu miṭaitaṟappiṉ veṟṟiceytu virumputalāl vaṭaticaiyilviṭṭa taṇṭu matacāṇai viṭṭāṇmai ceytu
vaṭa maṉṉarait tiṟaippaṭutti muṉivāṟikkaccipukku muḻu taracun tiṟai kavarntu veṟṟiceyta pukaḻp perumaiyum virakkoṭiyumuṭaṉevi Emmaṇṭalamum Evalkeḻppa Īḻamaṇṭalam Eṟivatāka Aṅku Iruntu tiraikkaruṅkaṭal micait taṇṭevic ceṉṟu ceṟumalai Ām maṇṭalattaracu nikki Aḻakāy ceṉai Aḻivittu veḷaikoṇṭu virumputaṟku viraṉtaṉ marapil veḷaikoṇṭuvanta ventaṉaip paṇikoṇṭu veḷḷipparicella tiruvuḷḷam vaittaruḷi Ilaṅkāpuri Aṉṉāḷiliṟantaṉa nenak keṭṭaruḷi kalaṅkātuṉiṉṟa va
ntanakuṉiṟṟāṉai taṉai vinaṅkittikku Eṭṭum Evalkeṭpa cakkaraveṟpiṟa pukaḻ paṟippac cempon virasiṅhāsa- nattup puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyuṅ karuvūrum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭit talaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkolottuṅkacoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5vatu Irājentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkaṟampai nāṭṭu brahmadeśam tiru Ucāttāṉam Āṉa keraḷakulācaṉic carup
peti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruccenṉelpuṟam tāmotiraṉ vāykkāl mikaṇṭattu rūpāy ÿ Innilam Irumāvaḷarakkum kiḻpāṟkellai muṟcollappaṭṭa vāykkālukku merkkun tenpāṟkellai tirupputtūr caṭaiya pirāṉpaṭṭaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nārācavarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Omayintaṉ sūriya[deva]bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ paṭṭālaka teṟkum Āka Icaiṉta perunānkellaikkuppaṭṭa nilam Irumāvaraiyum
Ivvākkāl kiḻkaṇṭattuk karumālaraikkaleṉpa per pecappaṭṭa rūpāy ÿ Innilam Iru māvaraikkum kiḻpāṟkkellai nārācavarampukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai kkum vaṭapāṟkellai Innāyanār tiruviḷakkuppuṟam kuṭiniṅkākkāṇi Omayiṉta Āka Iḷacaṉta
ṭṭa nilam Irumāvaraiyum Ivvākkālil mikaṇṭattut teṟkkaṭaiyp porumpuṭaiyān Iraṇṭu māveṉṟu perpecappaṭṭa rūpāy sa Iṉ Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭumāvukkum kiḻpāṟkkellai muṟpe Āḷuṭaiyān paṭṭan nilattukkum miḻalaininṟa paṭṭaṉ nilattukkum perum
nokkip pokiṟa Ūr ciṟuvākkālukkut teṟkkum Āka Icaiṉta perunānkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum pāṭoṭi vāykkālil Orucciṟakiṉil cālaiyeṉṟu per pecappaṭṭaRest of the record is built in.
Digital edition of SII 25.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
